fix: avoid telegram plugin self-recursive sdk imports

fix: keep openai-codex on HTTP responses transport
fix(sandbox): add CJK fonts to browser image (#56905)
Track ACP sessions_spawn runs and emit ACP lifecycle events (#40885)
fix(ci): retry actionlint release downloads

docs(changelog): add slack status reactions entry
fix(plugins): keep built cli metadata scans lightweight

docs: add LINE ACP support and plugin requireApproval hook docs
Update CHANGELOG.md
fix(agents): fail closed on silent turns (#52593)
docs: add missing feature docs for Matrix E2EE thumbnails, LINE media, and CJK memory
docs: remove stale MiniMax M2.5 refs and add image generation docs
fix(web-search): localize shared search cache (#54040)
Tests: stabilize shard-2 queue and channel state
Agents: cover subagent memory tool policy
fix: allow memory_search and memory_get in sub-agent sessions
docs(plugins): refresh bundled plugin runtime docs
refactor(test): centralize bundled channel test roots
refactor(plugins): decouple bundled plugin runtime loading
fix(gateway/auth): local trusted-proxy fallback to require token auth (#54536)
fix(subagents): preserve requester agent for inline announces (#55998)
fix(telegram): sanitize invalid stream-order errors (#55999)
fix(agents): repair btw reasoning and oauth snapshot refresh (#56001)
test: reset plugin runtime state in optional tools tests
fix: prefer transcript model in sessions list (#55628) (thanks @MonkeyLeeT)
chore(test): harden channel plugin registry against malformed runtime state
Memory/LanceDB: fix bundled runtime manifest lookup (#56623)
style: normalize import order and formatting
refactor(markdown): share render-aware chunking
fix: apply Mistral compat across proxy transports
fix(imessage): try all inbound echo ids
fix(channels): use pinned channel registry for outbound adapter resolution
fix: prevent self-chat dedupe false positives (#55359) (thanks @rmarr)
Memory: fix FTS-only branch compile on rebased main
Memory: keep FTS-only indexing on reindex (#42714)
fix: populate FTS-only memory search without provider (#56473) (thanks @opriz)
Test: harden command queue test isolation (CI chore)
Status: suppress false dual-stack loopback port warning (#53398)
Docs: audit Matrix CLI and setup docs
Docs: audit Matrix channel docs
fix(discord): do not bypass requireMention for configuredBinding channels
feat(matrix): add draft streaming (edit-in-place partial replies) (#56387)
feature_items: xAI/tools: move the bundled xAI provider to the Responses API, add first-class `x_search`, and auto-enable the xAI plugin from owned web-search and tool config so bundled Grok auth/configured search flows work without manual plugin toggles. (#56048) Thanks @huntharo. [v2026.3.28]
MiniMax: add image generation provider for `image-01` model, supporting generate and image-to-image editing with aspect ratio control. (#54487) Thanks @liyuan97. [v2026.3.28]

Plugins/hooks: add async `requireApproval` to `before_tool_call` hooks, letting plugins pause tool execution and prompt the user for approval via the exec approval overlay, Telegram buttons, Discord interactions, or the `/approve` command on any channel. The `/approve` command now handles both exec and plugin approvals with automatic fallback. (#55339) Thanks @vaclavbelak and @joshavant. [v2026.3.28]

ACP/channels: add current-conversation ACP binds for Discord, BlueBubbles, and iMessage so `/acp spawn codex --bind here` can turn the current chat into a Codex-backed workspace without creating a child thread, and document the distinction between chat surface, ACP session, and runtime workspace. [v2026.3.28]

Plugins/CLI backends: move bundled Claude CLI, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI inference defaults onto the plugin surface, add bundled Gemini CLI backend support, and replace `gateway run --claude-cli-logs` with generic `--cli-backend-logs` while keeping the old flag as a compatibility alias. [v2026.3.28]

Slack/tool actions: add an explicit `upload-file` Slack action that routes file uploads through the existing Slack upload transport, with optional filename/title/comment overrides for channels and DMs. [v2026.3.28]

Message actions/files: start unifying file-first sends on the canonical `upload-file` action by adding explicit support for Microsoft Teams and Google Chat, and by exposing BlueBubbles file sends through `upload-file` while keeping the legacy `sendAttachment` alias. [v2026.3.28]
CLI: add `openclaw config schema` to print the generated JSON schema for `openclaw.json`. (#54523) Thanks @kvokka. [v2026.3.28]

xAI/tools: move the bundled xAI provider to the Responses API, add first-class `x_search`, and auto-enable the xAI plugin from owned web-search and tool config so bundled Grok auth/configured search flows work without manual plugin toggles. (#56048) Thanks @huntharo. [v2026.3.28-beta.1]
MiniMax: add image generation provider for `image-01` model, supporting generate and image-to-image editing with aspect ratio control. (#54487) Thanks @liyuan97. [v2026.3.28-beta.1]

Plugins/hooks: add async `requireApproval` to `before_tool_call` hooks, letting plugins pause tool execution and prompt the user for approval via the exec approval overlay, Telegram buttons, Discord interactions, or the `/approve` command on any channel. The `/approve` command now handles both exec and plugin approvals with automatic fallback. (#55339) Thanks @vaclavbelak and @joshavant. [v2026.3.28-beta.1]

ACP/channels: add current-conversation ACP binds for Discord, BlueBubbles, and iMessage so `/acp spawn codex --bind here` can turn the current chat into a Codex-backed workspace without creating a child thread, and document the distinction between chat surface, ACP session, and runtime workspace. [v2026.3.28-beta.1]

Plugins/CLI backends: move bundled Claude CLI, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI inference defaults onto the plugin surface, add bundled Gemini CLI backend support, and replace `gateway run --claude-cli-logs` with generic `--cli-backend-logs` while keeping the old flag as a compatibility alias. [v2026.3.28-beta.1]

Slack/tool actions: add an explicit `upload-file` Slack action that routes file uploads through the existing Slack upload transport, with optional filename/title/comment overrides for channels and DMs. [v2026.3.28-beta.1]

Message actions/files: start unifying file-first sends on the canonical `upload-file` action by adding explicit support for Microsoft Teams and Google Chat, and by exposing BlueBubbles file sends through `upload-file` while keeping the legacy `sendAttachment` alias. [v2026.3.28-beta.1]
CLI: add `openclaw config schema` to print the generated JSON schema for `openclaw.json`. (#54523) Thanks @kvokka. [v2026.3.28-beta.1]
feat(slack): status reaction lifecycle for tool/thinking progress indicators (#56430)
feat(matrix): add draft streaming (edit-in-place partial replies) (#56387)

feat(line): add outbound media support for image, video, and audio
Agents: add memory flush append regression
ACP: document Matrix bind-here support
feat(xai): add plugin-owned x_search onboarding
Tools: add xAI-backed code_execution
xAI: add auth resolution diagnostics
Tools: add x_search via xAI Responses
Add reusable TypeScript topology analyzer for public surface usage
fix_items: Security/audit: extend web search key audit to recognize Gemini, Grok/xAI, Kimi, Moonshot, and OpenRouter credentials via a boundary-safe bundled-web-search registry shim. (#56540) [v2026.3.28]

Gateway/plugins: reuse the session workspace when building HTTP `/tools/invoke` tool lists and harden tool construction to infer the session agent workspace by default, so workspace plugins do not re-register on repeated HTTP tool calls. (#56101) thanks @neeravmakwana [v2026.3.28]

Security/audit: extend web search key audit to recognize Gemini, Grok/xAI, Kimi, Moonshot, and OpenRouter credentials via a boundary-safe bundled-web-search registry shim. (#56540) [v2026.3.28-beta.1]

Gateway/plugins: reuse the session workspace when building HTTP `/tools/invoke` tool lists and harden tool construction to infer the session agent workspace by default, so workspace plugins do not re-register on repeated HTTP tool calls. (#56101) thanks @neeravmakwana [v2026.3.28-beta.1]
